# Akbar Dhia

> Android and full-stack developer from Bogor, Indonesia. Builds mobile apps with Kotlin, web interfaces with React and Next.js, and backend systems with Laravel, Express, and Go. 18 years old, fresh out of vocational school, already shipping to production.

## About

- [About](https://www.akbardhia.me/2026/about): Background, skills, and experience. Interned at KEMENKOP RI building ODS Form — a data system used by cooperatives across Indonesia.

## Projects

- [ODS Form](https://www.akbardhia.me/2026/project/ods-form): Custom form builder integrated with ODS Mandiri for real-time cooperative data tracking. Built with React, Tailwind, Laravel. Live at KEMENKOP RI.
- [ODS Mandiri](https://www.akbardhia.me/2026/project/ods-mandiri): National online data system for Indonesian cooperatives — financial reporting, member profiles, legal documentation. React + Laravel.
- [Manager Usaha V2](https://www.akbardhia.me/2026/project/manager-usaha-v2): Android business management app with on-device ML classification. Kotlin + Laravel + ML Kit. Live on Play Store.
- [Cogito](https://www.akbardhia.me/2026/project/cogito): AI debate companion for real-time counter-argument generation. Hackathon project. Kotlin + Express + PostgreSQL + Qwen.
- [YAMLens](https://www.akbardhia.me/2026/project/yamlens): YAML validation and visualization tool.
- [Solera](https://www.akbardhia.me/2026/project/solera): Web project. React-based.

## Stack

Mobile: Kotlin, Android SDK, Jetpack Compose, Flutter, Dart
Web: React, Next.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion
Backend: Laravel, Express.js, Go, Node.js, PHP, Python, Prisma
Database: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Redis, Room DB
Tools: Docker, Git, Figma
